title: Crates
description: Alternative to skulker boxes, but with very limited storage
body:
# Crates for b1.7.3 Station API
Requires Station API and Babric  
  
To name the crate you need to install [Retro Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/retrocommands)!  
Using RetroCommands, type `/crate {name}` with it in your hand

## Adds Crates to b1.7.3 Minecraft
A counterpart to modern minecraft shulkers

![Crate named "Tools" Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7771f9eca513a5a94ac009b0c454bd76a7a71191.png)

![The Crate Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f4babfb3f1b83b6d1d5d295cd3ce705988e2e67.png)
